summary: Tested new features: Finished Product Receive, Repack with R-series batch numbers, and Batch Additional Costs. All backend APIs and frontend UI working correctly.

minor.issue: POST response does not include calculated fields (additional_costs_total, total_raw_material_cost, cost_per_unit). These are only calculated on GET. This is by design but may confuse API consumers.

issues: Console warning: 'In HTML, <span> cannot be a child of <option>' - minor React hydration warning in source SKU dropdown

passed_tests: BACKEND: POST /api/finished-product-receive creates receive entry with correct fields (sku, quantity, source_name, cost_per_unit, total_cost)
BACKEND: POST /api/finished-product-receive creates finished_products record with source='receive'
BACKEND: GET /api/finished-product-receives returns list of all receives
BACKEND: DELETE /api/finished-product-receive/{id} removes receive entry and associated finished_products record
BACKEND: POST /api/finished-product-repack creates repack with R-series batch number (format: R-MMYYDDC)
BACKEND: POST /api/finished-product-repack deducts source stock FIFO and adds target stock
BACKEND: GET /api/finished-product-repacks returns list of all repacks
BACKEND: DELETE /api/finished-product-repack/{id} restores source stock and removes target stock
BACKEND: GET /api/reports/finished-ledger includes 'Receive' transaction type
BACKEND: GET /api/reports/finished-ledger includes 'Repack' transaction type (incoming)
BACKEND: GET /api/reports/finished-ledger includes 'Repack Out' transaction type (outgoing)
BACKEND: Batch additional_costs saved correctly and additional_costs_total calculated on GET (800 = 500 + 300)
FRONTEND: Finished Products page has 4 tabs (Stock Ledger, Dispatches, Receives, Repacks)
FRONTEND: Receive button opens modal with all required fields (SKU, Quantity, Source, Date, Cost, Notes)
FRONTEND: Receive form submission creates entry successfully
FRONTEND: Receives tab displays receive entries with correct data
FRONTEND: Repack button opens modal with all required fields (Source SKU, Target SKU, Qty Used, Qty Produced, Wastage, Date, Notes)
FRONTEND: Repack form submission creates entry with R-series batch number
FRONTEND: Repacks tab displays repack entries with R-series batch number
FRONTEND: Stock Ledger shows Receive transaction type with teal color coding
FRONTEND: Stock Ledger shows Repack transaction type with indigo color coding
updated_files: /app/backend/tests/test_receive_repack_features.py - Created test suite for receive/repack features
seed_data_creation: Created and cleaned up test data: receive entry (UI Test Supplier, 15 qty, 120 cost/unit) and repack entry (5 used, 4 produced, 1 wastage)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Receive and Repack features fully functional. Key endpoints: POST /api/finished-product-receive (creates finished_products with source='receive'), POST /api/finished-product-repack (generates R-MMYYDDC batch number, deducts source FIFO, adds target). Ledger includes Receive, Repack, Repack Out transaction types with color coding. Batch additional_costs feature works - costs saved on POST, calculated fields (additional_costs_total, total_raw_material_cost, cost_per_unit) computed on GET.

finished_product_repack.stock_handling: FIFO deduction from source, adds to target

batch_additional_costs.note: Costs saved on POST, calculated fields computed on GET
